allow: PowerShell($key = \(\(Get-Content .env.local | Select-String '^SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY='\).ToString\(\).Split\('=',2\)[1]\).Trim\(\); Write-Output "Laengde: $\($key.Length\), starter: $\($key.Substring\(0,10\)\)"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing "https://ruquyhjgqihgoqbojgau.supabase.co/rest/v1/bookings?select=id&limit=1" -Headers @{ apikey = $key } ; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\) Indhold: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; Write-Output "Status: $\([int]$resp.StatusCode\)"; try { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Output \("Body: " + $reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\) } catch {} })

PowerShell($key = "sb_publishable_fMEjvQPFE-DExEnPyJXdyw_m1ic8rda"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing "https://ruquyhjgqihgoqbojgau.supabase.co/rest/v1/bookings?select=id&limit=1" -Headers @{ apikey = $key }; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\) Indhold: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; Write-Output "Status: $\([int]$resp.StatusCode\)"; try { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Output \("Body: " + $reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\) } catch {} })

PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force "src/app/\(site\)" | Out-Null; Move-Item "src/app/page.tsx" "src/app/\(site\)/page.tsx"; foreach \($d in "priser","privat","erhverv","om-os","foer-efter","kontakt"\) { Move-Item "src/app/$d" "src/app/\(site\)/$d" }; Get-ChildItem src/app, "src/app/\(site\)" | Select-Object Name)
